6500–6989: CMHC/outpatient physical therapy 
services where TOB = 74X; CORF where TOB = 75X 

6990–6999: Numbers Reserved (formerly Christian 
Science) 

7000–8499: Continuation of Home health 
Agencies (HHA) (also CCN ranges 3100–3199 
and 9000–9799) 

8500–8899: Continuation of rural 
health clinics (RHC) (provider based) 
(also CCN ranges 3400–3499 and 
3975–3999) 

8900–8999: Continuation of rural 
health clinics (RHC) (free-standing) 
(also CCN range 3800–3974) 

9000–9799: Continuation
